bullets: Pakistani Christians remaining vulnerable to misused blasphemy laws despite recent acquittals after years of wrongful detention.
Civilians in eastern Afghanistan and communities along the Pakistan-Afghanistan border amid cross-border airstrikes and ground operations causing casualties.
Civilians across Gaza facing ongoing airstrikes, displacement camp conditions overrun with rats and sewage, and families losing loved ones in repeated attacks.
Palestinians in the occupied West Bank losing access to farmland and livelihoods amid escalating restrictions and attacks.
Residents of southern Lebanon unable to return home amid continued military presence, fresh strikes, and over one million people struggling to access identity documents and basic services.
Civilians and shipping crews in and around the Strait of Hormuz and Bahrain caught in drone strikes and naval exchanges between major powers.
Families and communities across Ukraine and Russia caught in ongoing drone, missile, and airstrike exchanges with mounting civilian casualties.
Displaced women and children in Haiti sheltering in makeshift camps under ongoing gang violence and reports of sexual assault.
Transgender women in Syria facing attacks, forced detention, and isolation under the new governing authorities.
Immigrants and foreign nationals in South Africa facing vigilante attacks and displacement, including thousands of Malawian migrants forced to flee with nothing.
Civilians in Myanmar injured in repeated military airstrikes on residential areas.
Somali civilians in the capital caught between security forces and political tensions, and communities in the southeast amid ongoing military operations against armed groups.
Kidnapping victims and threatened communities in Nigeria amid militant attacks and the arrest of commanders linked to armed extremist groups.
Families of soldiers and civilians killed or wounded in armed attacks in the Philippines.
Communities in Yemen's tribal regions wounded in ambushes carried out by armed forces.
Security personnel and border communities in Kenya following an armed attack on a security installation.
Myanmar women held for approximately five years in an Indian detention facility and alleging abuse in custody.
Families of those killed in airstrikes on militia installations in Iraq, and officials and lawmakers detained in anti-corruption raids in the capital.
Thousands of protesters in Serbia and Albania enduring weeks of demonstrations amid detentions and calls for political accountability.
Civilians in Nairobi allegedly tortured in custody following arrests at a peaceful memorial gathering.
Displaced communities in Lebanon unable to return to their homes amid ongoing uncertainty and unresolved conflict terms.
Venezuelans in northern coastal regions amid catastrophic twin earthquakes, with over 920 confirmed dead, thousands injured, and hundreds still trapped under collapsed buildings

Communities across the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda amid a record-breaking Ebola outbreak with over 1,200 infected and 321 deaths, including nearly two million displaced people cut off from medical care

Families across Western Europe — especially the elderly and young — amid a record-breaking heatwave linked to over 1,300 excess deaths, with all-time national temperature records broken across multiple countries
Residents across Japan and Taiwan displaced, flooded, and facing landslide danger as a typhoon brings catastrophic rainfall and mass evacuations affecting over two million people

Families across the United States mourning deaths and displacement from simultaneous disasters — flash floods killing at least four in Kentucky, wildfires killing three firefighters along the Utah-Colorado border, storm damage across multiple states, measles spreading across 41 jurisdictions, and volcanic ashfall threatening Hawaiian communities
About 1,300 residents of a remote community in Canada's Northwest Territories and hundreds more in Manitoba displaced by out-of-control wildfires with no confirmed return timeline
Families in Taiwan mourning flood deaths and facing widespread inundation after typhoon-driven rains submerged homes and neighborhoods
Residents of Madagascar grieving 20 deaths and recovering from widespread destruction left by a cyclone
Families across Afghanistan's northeastern regions following a magnitude 6.1 earthquake in a remote and underserved area with uncertain access to shelter and aid
Communities in Belgium and health workers responding to a growing mpox cluster amid rising case counts
Residents near the Kamchatka River in Russia facing dangerous and rising floodwaters with no confirmed relief response
Workers and families in India affected by flash floods and a landslide, with missing persons still unaccounted for and one person critically injured
